# Cadence

> Managed subscription billing engine built on Nomba's payment APIs 
> for Nigerian developers.

## What it is
Cadence is a service layer that sits between Nomba's payment 
primitives and a merchant's product. It automates recurring charges, 
failed-payment recovery, and subscriber lifecycle management. 
Merchants interact via a REST API and dashboard. Subscribers manage 
their billing via a magic-link portal. Cadence handles all Nomba API 
calls internally — neither merchant nor subscriber touches Nomba directly.

## Architecture
- Backend: FastAPI (Python), PostgreSQL via Docker/Render, hosted on Render
- Dunning scheduler runs as a separate Render Cron Job process, 
  NOT a background thread inside FastAPI
- Multi-tenant: each merchant has Projects; API keys are scoped to projects
- Nomba OAuth tokens are cached per-project with 30-minute expiry 
  and auto-refreshed
- tokenKey (card token for recurring charges) is captured from Nomba 
  webhook payload at payload["data"]["tokenKey"]
- Swagger UI (/docs) is disabled. Developer docs live at /developer

## Subscription Lifecycle
Six states with enforced valid transitions only:
trialing → active → past_due → suspended → cancelled/expired

Dunning schedule on payment failure: retry at day 1, day 3, day 7.
After day 7 failure: suspended → cancelled.

## API
Base URL: https://cadence.onrender.com
Auth: Authorization: Bearer cd_<key>
Keys are project-scoped and generated from the merchant dashboard.

Endpoints:
POST   /api/plans                        Create a subscription plan
GET    /api/plans                        List plans
GET    /api/plans/{id}                   Get plan
DELETE /api/plans/{id}                   Soft-delete a plan
POST   /api/subscriptions                Enroll subscriber, returns checkout_url
GET    /api/subscriptions                List subscriptions
GET    /api/subscriptions/{id}           Get subscription state
POST   /api/subscriptions/{id}/cancel    Cancel subscription (immediate or at period end)
POST   /api/subscriptions/{id}/portal-link  Generate subscriber magic link
POST   /api/payments/{id}/refund         Refund a payment

## Key Concepts
- tokenKey: Nomba's card token returned after first checkout. 
  Used for all future recurring charges. Stored on the subscription.
- dunning: Automatic retry schedule for failed payments.
- portal-link: Magic link sent to subscriber for self-service 
  billing management. No password required.
- project: Multi-tenancy container. One merchant can have many projects.
- pre-flight recovery: To prevent double charging, Cadence verifies any pending payment with Nomba's requery API before executing a retry.

## Docs
- /developer — Introduction and quickstart
- /developer/authentication — API key format and usage
- /developer/plans — Plans API reference
- /developer/subscriptions — Subscriptions API reference
- /developer/webhooks — Webhook events and HMAC verification
- /developer/errors — Error codes
- /developer/payments — Payments and refunds API reference
- /openapi.json — Machine-readable OpenAPI spec
- /llms.txt — Machine-readable LLM context
